Package org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli

Class BaseCommand

java.lang.Object
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.AbstractCommand
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.BaseCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, Command
public abstract class BaseCommand extends AbstractCommand
A command that groups a list of subcommands that can be executed separately.

  • Field Details

    • subCommands

      protected Map<String,Command> subCommands
      The supported subcommands.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseCommand

      protected BaseCommand(Context context, String name, String description)
      Creates a new base command to group subcommands.
      Parameters:
      context - the context of the shell session
      name - the name of the base command
      description - the description of the base command

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public int execute(String[] args)
      Description copied from interface: Command
      Executes the command with the give arguments. The command must support being interrupted by the user (by interrupting the caller thread).
      Parameters:
      args - the command arguments. The command name is not part of the arguments.
      Returns:
      the exit status of the execution

    • addSubCommand

      protected void addSubCommand(String name, Function<String[],Integer> action, String description)
      Creates and adds a new subcommand to the list of subcommands supported by this command.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the subcommand
      action - the action to run when the the subcommand is executed
      description - the description of the subcommand
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if a subcommand of the given name already exists

    • addSubCommand

      protected void addSubCommand(CommandFactory factory)
      Adds the given subcommand to the list of subcommands supported by this command.
      Parameters:
      factory - the factory for a new subcommand of this command
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if a subcommand of the given name already exists

    • getCompleter

      public org.jline.reader.Completer getCompleter()
      Description copied from interface: Command
      Gets a completer to generate tab-completion candidates of this command and its arguments.
      Specified by:
      getCompleter in interface Command
      Overrides:
      getCompleter in class AbstractCommand
      Returns:
      the completer for the command

    • printHelp

      public void printHelp(PrintWriter printer)
      Description copied from interface: Command
      Prints a detailed description of what the command does.
      Specified by:
      printHelp in interface Command
      Overrides:
      printHelp in class AbstractCommand
      Parameters:
      printer - where to print the help text

    • close

      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Overrides:
